title: Add shell completion of container and image names
body:
Add shell (bash) completion of container and image names.

When I type a command like:
```
# buildah rm
```
I would like to be able to complete the name of containers.

The same when an image name needs to be given.

comments.body:
Works for me?
```
# buildah rm <tab><tab>
3df3377f101af284557ae528c9f38e7d69f4fb8055714a9845811d30cc82db96
8f0455b0d799602cf54445a20212cbc2de932069f6510f47f5417eecccb9bb9a
```
Seems to work for me.

```
buildah containers -q
3df3377f101af284557ae528c9f38e7d69f4fb8055714a9845811d30cc82db96
8f0455b0d799602cf54445a20212cbc2de932069f6510f47f5417eecccb9bb9a
```
 rpm -q buildah
buildah-1.4-3.git608fa84.fc29.x86_64

Ah ok yes, for `buildah rm` and `buildah rmi` it completes the IDs. What I was trying to do is to start writing the container/image *name* and then press Tab, but it doesn't complete the names, just the IDs.

A better example is with `buildah run`, when we want to provide the container name. It's easy to remember the name, not the ID, so the completion of the container name would be useful for that command.
Fixed in master.  Fix will be in buildah-1.6.
